# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: clone

before_script:
  - GITLAB_MR_TITLE=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B | grep '^    MR Title: ' | sed 's/    MR Title: //')
  - GITLAB_MR_DESC=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B | grep '^    MR Description: ' | sed 's/    MR Description: //')

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project for merge request: $GITLAB_MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Build details: $GITLAB_MR_DESC"

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying project related to MR: $GITLAB_MR_TITLE"
    - git tag -a "deploy-$(date +%Y%m%d)-$GITLAB_MR_TITLE" -m "Deployed for merge request: $GITLAB_MR_TITLE"
    - git push origin "deploy-$(date +%Y%m%d)-$GITLAB_MR_TITLE"
